---
title: "Publications"
description: "Published papers, preprints, and collaborations by Shunyu Wu."
keywords:
  - Shunyu Wu publications
  - shunyuwu publications
  - 吴舜宇 论文
  - 吴舜禹 论文
  - decision-focused learning
toc: false
---

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    {
      "@type": "ScholarlyArticle",
      "name": "End-to-End Stochastic Predict-Then-Optimize for Cost-Efficient Water-Energy Resource Scheduling",
      "datePublished": "2025",
      "url": "https://doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238"
    },
    {
      "@type": "ScholarlyArticle",
      "name": "Knowledge-based Bi-correction model for achieving effective lag-free characteristic on daily urban water demand forecasting",
      "datePublished": "2024",
      "url": "https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508"
    },
    {
      "@type": "ScholarlyArticle",
      "name": "CritiCoder: An End-to-End Uncertain Regression Network for Robust Macroscopic Pressure Models in Water Distribution Systems",
      "datePublished": "2023",
      "url": "https://doi.org/10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330"
    }
  ]
}
</script>

::: {.section-note}
Status is explicitly separated into **Published**, **Preprints**, and **Collaborations** to avoid ambiguity.
:::

## Citation Profiles

- Google Scholar: [Shunyu Wu profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=keb-zTsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=ao)
- ORCID record: [0000-0001-9856-2148](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9856-2148)
- CV bundle with publication list: [CV page](/cv/)

## Published (First-Author)

1. [End-to-End Stochastic Predict-Then-Optimize for Cost-Efficient Water-Energy Resource Scheduling](2025-tsg-water-energy.qmd)  
IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid, 2025. DOI: [10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238)
2. [Knowledge-based Bi-correction Model for Lag-free Daily Urban Water Demand Forecasting](2024-eswa-water-demand.qmd)  
Expert Systems with Applications, 2024. DOI: [10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508)
3. [CritiCoder: End-to-End Uncertain Regression for Robust Macroscopic Pressure Models in WDN](2023-tcss-criticoder.qmd)  
IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems, 2023. DOI: [10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330](https://doi.org/10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330)

## Preprints (Under Review / In Preparation)

1. [Crossing the Separation Point: Stabilizing Decision-Focused Learning with Variational Free-Energy](2025-neurips-vfe.qmd)  
NeurIPS, under review (2025).
2. [Proximal Descent for Stable Decision-Focused Training with Inexact Surrogate Gradients](2025-neurips-proximal.qmd)  
NeurIPS, under review (2025).
3. [Planning the Invisible: End-to-End Sensor Deployment Regret Minimization for Anomaly-Aware Water Networks](2026-aaai-sensor.qmd)  
AAAI, under review (2026).
4. [Beyond Objective Parameters: Parametric Dual-Gap Regret for Predict-then-Optimize under Unknown Constraint Parameters](2026-iclr-dual-gap.qmd)  
ICLR, planned / in revision (2026).
5. [Projection-to-Envelopes Solver for Constrained Optimization](2026-inprep-envelope.qmd)  
In preparation (2026).

## Collaborations (Selected Published)

1. [Reinforcement Learning Controller Design for Discrete-Time-Constrained Nonlinear Systems With Weight Initialization Method](2024-tsmc-rl-controller.qmd)  
IEEE TSMC: Systems, 2024. DOI: [10.1109/TSMC.2023.3344883](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSMC.2023.3344883)
2. [Prediction of Energy Consumption in Horizontal Roughing Process Based on TDADE Algorithm](2023-tase-tdade.qmd)  
IEEE TASE, 2023. DOI: [10.1109/TASE.2023.3236306](https://doi.org/10.1109/TASE.2023.3236306)
